news.headline: Diebold Nixdorf installs ATMs in Antarctica's McMurdo Station, now present on all 7 continents. - 100 characters
news.summary: Diebold Nixdorf, based in North Canton, Ohio, celebrated a significant milestone on April 2, 2025, with the deployment of ATMs at McMurdo Station. This achievement marks their presence on all seven continents. The company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol DBD, is renowned for revolutionizing banking and retail experiences. The successful installation at McMurdo Station signifies their global reach and commitment to enhancing convenience for customers worldwide.

news.headline: New documentary sheds light on Frank Lucas, Harlem drug lord. Explores rise and fall of kingpin who smuggled uncut heroin.
news.summary: A recently released documentary delves into the life of Frank Lucas, a prominent figure in the lore of black gangsters. This film sheds light on the true price of power as it explores how Lucas, a kingpin and hustler from Harlem, established his empire by trafficking uncut heroin known as "Blue Magic." The documentary, released in New York on April 2, 2025, provides a captivating insight into the underworld operations of Lucas, who gained notoriety for his criminal activities.

news.headline: NGP and Wing Resources create Wing Resources VIII, with $100M equity from NGP. Led by Nick Varel, aims to acquire mineral interests.
news.summary: In Dallas, Wing Resources VIII, LLC ("Wing VIII") has established a new mineral and royalty acquisition platform with $100 million in equity commitments from NGP Royalty Partners III, L.P. This fund, led by President and CEO Nick Varel, focuses on acquiring mineral and royalty interests. Wing VIII aims to build on the accomplishments of its predecessors by acquiring top-tier mineral and royalty assets. The company continues its mission to procure high-quality mineral and royalty interests.

news.headline: Middlesex Water's Tidewater Utilities acquires Ocean View Water System in completed deal.
news.summary: In the latest developments, it has been reported that there has been a significant increase in unemployment rates in the country. The latest data shows that the unemployment rate has surged to a record high of 14.7%, reflecting the impact of the ongoing economic slowdown. This increase translates to approximately 23 million people currently unemployed. The job market has been severely affected by the pandemic, leading to widespread job losses across various sectors. These unprecedented numbers highlight the urgent need for government intervention to address the growing unemployment crisis and support those affected. Experts suggest that the road to recovery may be long and challenging, requiring coordinated efforts from both the public and private sectors to revive the economy and create new job opportunities.

news.headline: Share capital and voting rights data disclosed for March 2025, revealing key financial figures.
Preparatory details for the May 15, 2025 Combined Shareholders' Meeting are now accessible. #ShareholdersMeeting #May152025
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the national unemployment rate has risen to 6.9%, affecting approximately 11.1 million people. The job market saw a decrease of 245,000 positions in the past month, with the most significant losses occurring in the retail and hospitality sectors. The current economic climate continues to be challenging due to the ongoing pandemic, with many businesses struggling to stay afloat. Experts suggest that government intervention and stimulus measures may be necessary to stabilize the job market and support those who have lost their livelihoods. The situation remains uncertain, and it is crucial for policymakers to address these issues promptly to prevent further economic downturn.

news.headline: Leggett & Platt sells Aerospace Products Group for $285 million to Tinicum Incorporated.
news.summary: Carthage, Missouri - On April 2, 2025, Leggett & Platt announced the sale of its Aerospace Products Group to affiliated funds managed by Tinicum Incorporated for $285 million in cash, excluding standard working capital and debt adjustments. The agreement marks a significant transaction for the company.

news.headline: Dogecoin and Shiba Inu down 20% and 15% in past week; Dogecoin at $0.1724 with $25.6B market cap, Shiba Inu at $0.00001233 with $7.26B market cap.
news.summary: In the past week, Dogecoin (DOGE) has experienced a 20% decrease in price, currently standing at $0.1724 with a market cap of $25.6 billion. Shiba Inu (SHIB) also saw a decline of 15%, with the price at $0.00001233 and a market cap of $7.26 billion. The 24-hour trend for DOGE shows a 0.8% increase, while SHIB saw a 3.3% decrease. Over the course of 7 days, DOGE dropped by 15.9% and SHIB by 20.3%. Pepe (PEPE) currently stands at $0.057391 with a market cap of $3.1 billion, experiencing a 2.4% decrease in the last 24 hours and a 19.2% decline over 7 days. Crypto trader Nebraskangooner highlighted that SHIB's recent surge was misleading, as many altcoins faced resistance and subsequent retracement.

news.headline: Redwire appoints Mike Gold as President of Civil and International Space Business to lead global expansion with emphasis on European market growth.
news.summary: Redwire Corporation, a prominent player in space infrastructure for the evolving space market, disclosed that Mike Gold has been named President of Civil and International Space business. This move underscores the company’s dedication to expanding worldwide and entering new global markets. Redwire has broadened its reach in Europe by inaugurating a new office in Warsaw, Poland. The company is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol RDW.

news.headline: UK Stats Body staff vote for extending industrial action reports.
Bowman wins $2.2M contract for designing 1,236 ADA-compliant curb ramps in Philadelphia to reach 10,000 ramps by 2038.
news.summary: A national engineering services firm, Bowman Consulting Group Ltd. (NASDAQ: BWMN), based in Reston, Va., has secured a $2.2 million contract to plan 1,236 ADA-compliant curb ramps for 355 intersections in Philadelphia. This contract signifies Bowman's fifth successive ADA-related project in Philadelphia as the city aims to implement 10,000 ADA-compliant curb ramps by April 2038. Bowman will oversee the design and implementation of these ramps in this latest assignment.

news.headline: Beamr to present AV1 solutions at 2025 NAB Show, with NVIDIA GPU acceleration, offering high-quality at competitive cost.
news.summary: At the upcoming 2025 NAB Show in Las Vegas, Beamr is set to present its advanced AV1 solutions, enhanced by NVIDIA GPUs, featuring straightforward and cost-effective pricing. This exhibition demonstrates Beamr's commitment to providing top-notch performance in video compression technology.

news.headline: Aramark's IN2WORK program reaches 20 years, expanding to 32 states with 290+ programs and 14,000+ graduates.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, Aramark Correctional Services is commemorating the 20th year of its IN2WORK (I2W) initiative. This program has been instrumental in aiding numerous justice-impacted individuals, providing education and professional certifications to facilitate success while incarcerated and upon reintegration into society. The voluntary IN2WORK program has assisted thousands of incarcerated individuals in acquiring skills for future employment and community re-entry. It includes training in food and warehouse safety, culminating in the prestigious ServSafe Managers certification.

news.headline: Canopy Growth introduces Spectrum Reserve, a premium medical cannabis brand in Canada. Aims to meet patient needs with high-quality products.
news.summary: In Ontario, Canopy Growth Corporation, a prominent cannabis company traded on the TSX as WEED and Nasdaq as CGC, has introduced Spectrum Reserve, a high-end medical cannabis brand in Canada. Spectrum Reserve is tailored to cater to the changing requirements of medical cannabis users and is considered the epitome of cannabis cultivation. The brand boasts flowers chosen for their size, potency, and terpene levels, providing top-notch quality for consumers.

news.headline: Trump to announce details of sweeping tariffs on 'Liberation Day,' causing global trade tension with companies and partners.
news.summary: The head of state is expected to reveal specifics of his extensive tariffs, causing companies and international trade allies to hastily prepare their reactions.

news.headline: Conagra Brands (NYSE: CAG) approves quarterly dividend payment of $0.35 per share to be paid on May 29, 2025.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Conagra Brands, Inc. revealed that the Board of Directors has sanctioned a quarterly dividend of $0.35 per share for their common stock (NYSE: CAG). This dividend is to be distributed on May 29, 2025, to shareholders of record as of April 28.

news.headline: CME Group achieves new quarterly ADV record of 29.8 million contracts, with March reaching 30.8 million, up 27% YoY.
news.summary: In March, there was a notable increase in trading activity with a second-highest average daily volume (ADV) reaching 30.8 million contracts, showcasing a 27% rise from the previous year. The quarter also saw record-breaking ADV for various products including interest rates, equity indices, agricultural commodities, foreign exchange, and cryptocurrencies. Additionally, ADV reached unprecedented levels in U.S. Treasury and Henry Hub Natural Gas complexes.

news.headline: De Gruyter launches guide "Returning Well" for smoother return from parental leave, aiming to redefine shared responsibility.
news.summary: Returning Well offers valuable resources to individuals returning from parental leave and the managers who are assisting them, aiming to facilitate a more seamless transition back to work. This initiative provides practical tools and research-supported strategies to ensure a successful return for parents, as well as guidance for managers in supporting their transition. This program focuses on addressing the challenges faced by individuals returning to work after parental leave and aims to ease the process for everyone involved.

news.headline: ProMOS partners with Silvaco for silicon photonics; using Victory TCAD for next-gen devices. Improving design accuracy and efficiency.
news.summary: Silvaco Group, Inc., a leading provider of TCAD, EDA software, and SIP solutions for semiconductor design and digital twin modeling through AI software, recently revealed that ProMOS Technologies has chosen to integrate Silvaco’s Victory TCAD™ simulation solution. This strategic move aims to expedite the advancement of next-gen silicon photonics devices. By harnessing Silvaco’s innovative technology, ProMOS intends to elevate the precision, productivity, and dependability of its photonic device designs. This announcement was made on April 02, 2025, from Santa Clara, Calif., underscoring Silvaco's commitment to driving technological progress in the industry.

news.headline: Aurora Spine's SiLO TFX™ Sacroiliac Fusion System shows superior biomechanical performance in new study in Neurospine journal.
news.summary: A medical device company, Aurora Spine Corporation, revealed the release of a new clinical study titled "Fixation of the Sacroiliac Joint: A Cadaver-Based Concurrent-Controlled Biomechanical Comparison of Posterior Interposition and Posterolateral Transosseous Techniques" in the journal Neurospine. The study examines the biomechanical effectiveness of Aurora Spine's SiLO TFX™ MIS Sacroiliac Joint Fixation System in contrast to conventional posterolateral transosseous methods. The study was published on April 02, 2025. Aurora Spine is listed on the TSXV as ASG and on the OTCQB as ASAPF.

news.headline: American Tungsten Corp. becomes member of Critical Minerals Institute. Listed as CSE:TUNG, OTCQB:DEMRF, FSE:RK9.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 2, 2025, American Tungsten Corp revealed that it has joined the Critical Minerals Institute as a new member. The company, listed as CSE:TUNG, OTCQB:DEMRF, FSE:RK9, expressed delight at this development.

news.headline: XOMA Royalty's Chief Investment Officer will present at a conference on April 8-9, 2025 in Emeryville, California.
news.summary: Emeryville, California - On April 2, 2025, XOMA Royalty Corporation (NASDAQ: XOMA), a biotech royalty aggregator, revealed that Chief Investment Officer Brad Sitko is scheduled to speak at the Jones Healthcare and Technology Innovation Conference on April 8-9, 2025.

news.headline: Pyxis Oncology (Nasdaq: PYXS) CEO Lara S. Sullivan to speak at virtual Targeted Oncology Forum on April 9, 2025, 11:30am ET.
news.summary: Boston-based Pyxis Oncology, Inc. (Nasdaq: PYXS), a clinical-stage biotech firm focusing on advanced therapies for challenging cancers, shared news of Lara S. Sullivan, M.D., serving as President, CEO, and CMO, engaging in a fireside chat at the Stifel 2025 Virtual Targeted Oncology Forum on April 9, 2025, at 11:30 a.m. ET. Additionally, the company will conduct individual investor meetings at the same event.

news.headline: Biogen's drug BIIB080 targeting tau for Alzheimer's disease gets FDA Fast Track status, for faster development/review.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Biogen Inc. received Fast Track designation from the FDA for their investigational drug BIIB080 targeting tau to treat Alzheimer’s disease. The Fast Track designation aims to accelerate the review process of drugs addressing critical conditions with unmet medical needs. BIIB080 is an antisense oligonucleotide (ASO) therapy and Biogen Inc. is listed as BIIB on the Nasdaq. This designation signifies a significant step forward in the potential treatment of Alzheimer’s disease.

news.headline: Sensei Biotherapeutics (Nasdaq: SNSE) to participate in Canaccord Genuity Horizons in Oncology Virtual Conference on April 7.
news.summary: In Boston on April 2, 2025, Sensei Biotherapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNSE), a biotech company in the clinical stage, specializing in innovative cancer treatments, shared that John Celebi, the President and CEO, is set to join the New Radiotherapy and Targeted Therapy Approaches panel at the Canaccord Genuity Horizons in Oncology Virtual Conference. This session is scheduled for Monday, April 7 at 2:00 p.m. ET.

news.headline: Patagonia Gold signs deal with Newmont Corp for $1.5 million to acquire 100% stake in Tornado and Huracan gold properties.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 2, 2025, Patagonia Gold Corp. announced a binding letter agreement signed on April 1, 2025, with Oroplata S.A., a subsidiary of Newmont Corporation. The agreement grants Newmont the option to acquire a 100% interest in Patagonia's Tornado and Huracan gold and silver properties, which includes an exploration permit called "El Diablo." In exchange, Newmont will make total cash payments of US$1,500,000. Newmont is listed on NYSE, TSX, ASX, and PNGX under the symbols NEM and NGT.

news.headline: Quoin Pharmaceuticals reports positive data from Netherton Syndrome study: skin almost fully healed after 6 weeks of treatment, patient experiences improved sleep with no need for additional medications. No adverse events reported.
news.summary: Quoin Pharmaceuticals Ltd. released positive clinical data from its ongoing Investigator Pediatric Netherton Syndrome study. After 6 weeks of using QRX003, the subject's skin showed significant healing and no longer needed medications like antibiotics, antivirals, antihistamines, and glucocorticoids. The patient also experienced a reduction in itch and zero nightly sleep disturbances without sedating medication for the first time. No adverse events were reported after 6 weeks of using QRX003.

news.headline: Costamare Inc. declares quarterly dividends: US $0.476563 on Series B, US $0.531250 on Series C, US $0.546875 on Series D Preferred Stock.
news.summary: Costamare Inc. has announced cash dividends for its preferred stocks. The dividends are as follows: US $0.476563 per share for the 7.625% Series B Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock, US $0.531250 per share for the 8.50% Series C Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock, and US $0.546875 per share for the 8.75% Series D Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock. These dividends cover the period from January 15, 2025, to April 14, 2025, and will be paid on April 15, 2025. Shareholders of record as of April 14, 2025, for the Series B, C, and D Preferred Stocks will receive the dividends.

news.headline: Sapiens unveils enhancements for insurers with IllustrationPro and ApplicationPro, aiming for seamless policy management.
news.summary: New developments from Sapiens International Corporation, a prominent global provider (NASDAQ: SPNS) (TASE: SPNS), aim to enhance policy management and agent satisfaction. Released on April 2, 2025, these updates prioritize automation, risk intelligence, and customization for a smoother experience.

news.headline: AGF Investments announces extra distributions for three ETFs (QGB, QIE, QUS) in Toronto on April 2, 2025.
news.summary: In Toronto on April 2, 2025, AGF Investments Inc. disclosed extra ad hoc distributions for three of its ETFs. AGF Systematic Global Multi-Sector Bond ETF (QGB), AGF Systematic International Equity ETF (QIE), and AGF Systematic US Equity ETF (QUS) will be receiving these distributions. Typically, these ETFs make quarterly or annual distributions, but this announcement includes additional distributions beyond the regular schedule.

news.headline: 70% chance of crypto bottom before June due to trade fears: Nansen. Trump to announce tariffs; $1.2 trillion trade deficit at stake. Bitcoin holds $82k.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency market is expected to see a potential bottom in the next two months due to global uncertainty over import tariff negotiations. US President Trump plans to announce reciprocal import tariffs aimed at reducing the country's $1.2 trillion trade deficit. Cryptocurrency analyst Aurelie Barthere predicts a 70% chance for crypto prices to bottom between now and June, with BTC and ETH currently trading 15% and 22% below their year-to-date highs respectively. Both traditional and crypto markets lack upside momentum ahead of the tariff announcement. Investors are in a "wait and see" mode, with the Crypto Fear & Greed Index showing marginal improvement. Bitcoin needs to hold $82k and traders are looking for a breakout above $84,500 as a signal for more upside momentum.

news.headline: Celonis appoints Kaushik Mitra as India Go-To-Market Leader to drive growth; named Vice President for GTM.
news.summary: Celonis has recently appointed Kaushik Mitra as the Vice President and Head of India Go-to-Market (GTM). The company made this announcement from Bengaluru, India, New York, and Munich.

news.headline: Greece plans to allocate €25 billion for defense over the next 12 years.
Voltage partners with Amber App to introduce Lightning Network for quick Bitcoin payments in Australia, enhancing user experience.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on April 2, 2025, Voltage, a prominent Lightning payments platform, announced a collaboration with Amber App to enhance Bitcoin payments in Australia. This partnership aims to provide faster and more cost-effective payment solutions to users. Through integrating Voltage's cutting-edge infrastructure, Amber App, Australia's top Bitcoin service provider, seeks to streamline transactions for its users.

news.headline: Bitcoin is showing resilience amid uncertainty surrounding Trump's tariff announcements. Short-term optimism prevails, but deep tensions may be masked. Regulatory clarity around stablecoins and tokenized assets seen as bullish catalyst. Macro shock could impact liquidity and sentiment.
news.summary: Despite global uncertainties such as U.S. tariffs, inflation, and high interest rates, digital assets have shown resilience. Analysts warn that the current market rally may be masking deeper tensions with short-term optimism prevailing over long-term uncertainty. Mike Cahill, CEO of Douro Labs and contributor to the Pyth Network, believes that the markets rallying ahead of tariff announcements reflect short-term optimism. He emphasizes the importance of regulatory clarity, especially for stablecoins and tokenized assets, as a positive catalyst for institutions to invest. However, he also warns of a potential macro shock from high rates and trade tensions that could impact liquidity and sentiment.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs to offer private equity deals to wealthy individuals for the first time. Source: Bloomberg.
EIFS Industry Members Association announced 2024 EIFS Excellence Awards winners for exceptional projects.
news.summary: In Falls Church, Virginia on April 2, 2025, the EIFS Industry Members Association (EIMA) revealed the recipients of the 2024 EIFS Excellence Awards. These awards celebrate exceptional projects utilizing Exterior Insulation and Finish Systems (EIFS), with a focus on innovation and quality. The winners have showcased remarkable achievements in incorporating EIFS into their projects, highlighting the versatility and effectiveness of this building material. This year's winners demonstrate a commitment to excellence in construction and design, with a total of (insert number) projects being recognized for their outstanding use of EIFS.

news.headline: Essity makes CDP's "A List" for climate, recognized for transparency. 22,000+ companies from 130 nations assessed.
news.summary: In Stockholm on April 2, 2025, Essity, a hygiene and health company, received recognition by the non-profit environmental organization CDP for its outstanding performance in corporate transparency and climate initiatives. Essity secured a spot on CDP's prestigious "A List," making it among the top companies globally. This honor comes after a rigorous assessment that considered data from more than 22,000 companies spanning 130 countries.

news.headline: Bitcoin price may soar to $250K in 2025 if Fed eases with QE plan, says Arthur Hayes. Analysts foresee $132K target. Traders favor $110K.
news.summary: The article predicts that Bitcoin's price could surpass $250,000 by the end of the year due to expectations of an increasing fiat supply. The US Federal Reserve's shift to quantitative easing may contribute to this rally. Arthur Hayes of BitMEX foresees a rise to $250,000 from a local low of $76,500, driven by the Fed's adjustment in treasury operations. Other analysts offer more conservative estimates, with predictions ranging from $132,000 to $110,000 by 2025. Hayes is optimistic, buying Bitcoin between $90,000 and $76,500, trusting in the market throughout 2025. Despite the positive outlook, only 9% of traders are betting on Bitcoin reaching $250,000, with 60% expecting it to hit $110,000. Global tariff concerns and US President Donald Trump's upcoming announcement may impact Bitcoin and global risk appetite. The Fed's moves and economic conditions will ultimately shape Bitcoin's future trajectory.

news.headline: Lone Star Funds sells Tokyo Beta, one of Tokyo's largest rental property assets; acquired 1,000 loans in Japan.
news.summary: In Dallas, New York, London, and Tokyo, Lone Star Funds revealed the completion of the sale of Tokyo Beta, a significant rental property asset in Tokyo. The sale was carried out by an affiliate of Lone Star Real Estate Fund VI, L.P. Tokyo Beta was established by Lone Star after acquiring over one thousand non-performing loans in Japan from early 2020 to late 2022. Lone Star reorganized the management of Tokyo Beta post-acquisition.

news.headline: Bitcoin sales hit $109K all-time high, but many 2020 buyers are still holding, says Glassnode data. Recent sell-offs continue amid price volatility, with short-term holders holding 40% of wealth.
news.summary: A recent article by Glassnode revealed that Bitcoin investors who bought BTC in 2020 or later are still holding onto their investments, with $110,000 not being high enough to prompt them to sell. Investors who entered the market between three and five years ago have also retained their holdings despite significant price increases. The share of wealth held by investors who bought BTC 3-5 years ago has declined by 3 percentage points since its peak in November 2024, but remains historically elevated. On the other hand, over two-thirds of those who bought BTC 5-7 years ago have exited their positions. Recent buyers, categorized as short-term holders, have been more sensitive to price volatility, leading to episodes of panic selling as BTC/USD hit new highs and then experienced significant drops. However, the current short-term holder participation does not indicate a speculative frenzy seen in previous BTC price cycle tops. Short-term holders currently hold around 40% of Bitcoin's network wealth, which is lower than previous cycle tops. This suggests a more tempered and distributed bull market compared to prior cycles.

news.headline: Trade tensions rise as treasuries gain amidst anticipation of Trump's tariffs, market reacts.
Trump shows alignment with Xi Jinping as per Bloomber's report.
DOGE eyes US computer systems. Big move ahead. #cryptocurrency

XRP may have hit bottom at $2.02 after falling 22%. Bullish signs suggest it could rally to $3.80. Resistance at $2.25. Bearish outlook sees potential drop to $1.07. Analysts split on XRP's trajectory, with targets ranging from $2.70 to $8. Trader advises caution due to impending US tariffs and warns against hasty decisions.
news.summary: XRP's price fell 22% from March 19 to March 31, dropping to $2.02 and then rising 9% to $2.20. Analysts see bullish signs like a potential bottom and bullish divergence in the RSI, indicating a short-term bounce and potential recovery. Key resistance levels to watch are $2.25 and $2.70, with a bullish outlook for April targets at $2.70 and $3.80. However, veteran trader Peter Brandt warns of a head-and-shoulders pattern that could lead to a drop to $1.07 if the price breaks below $1.90. Other analysts disagree, with projections of $2.04 and potential recoveries to $5-8 levels. Macro headwinds from US tariffs could impact XRP's price movement. Due to the speculative nature of cryptocurrency investments, readers are advised to conduct their own research and exercise caution.

ECB's Schnabel: The US is so important that what happens in the US can have an impact on our decisions
SFL Corp (NYSE: SFL) schedules AGM on May 8, 2025, and record date on April 4, 2025. Report available at www.sflcorp.com.
news.summary: SFL Corporation Ltd. (NYSE: SFL) has announced that their 2025 Annual General Meeting is scheduled for May 8, 2025. Shareholders eligible to vote at the meeting must have their records set by April 4, 2025. The Notice of Annual General Meeting, along with relevant details such as the Company’s Annual Report on Form 20-F, will be shared on the Company’s website (www.sflcorp.com) before the meeting.

news.headline: Nykredit Realkredit A/S finalizes coupon rates adjustment for its bonds with significant changes in interest rates.
The Empower Campaign surpasses $1M in donations over 3 years, celebrated at RX3 charity tournament with Josh Allen.
news.summary: In Costa Mesa, California, on April 2, 2025, the Empower Campaign, a program dedicated to inspiring individuals to reach their fullest potential, has reached a significant achievement by exceeding $1 million in cumulative contributions during the last three years at the RX3 Charity Flag event.
